      "それは国家主義と主権独立を主要な動機として持っています。"

      "それはニカラグアの抑圧された農民の間で革命が農村地域で始まるという強調によって特徴づけられます。",

About: It is about a series of political and economic philosophies instituted by the Nicaraguan Sandinista National Liberation Front throughout the late twentieth century.
AssociatedWith: It is associated with Augusto César Sandino.
It is associated with Carlos Fonseca.
It is associated with the Cuban Revolution.
It is associated with Che Guevara.
It is associated with Fidel Castro.
ConsistsOf: It consists of political and economic philosophies.
CreatedBy: It was created by the Nicaraguan Sandinista National Liberation Front.
CreatedFor: It was created for the Nicaraguan people.
CreatedTo: It was created to inspire socialist populism among Nicaragua's peasant population.
It was created to build a society resistant to economic and military intervention imposed by foreign entities.
DevelopedBy: It was developed by Carlos Fonseca.
HasA: It has an emphasis that revolution begins in rural regions.
It has an effort to develop conscious growth through education.
It has an appeal to the largest mass of the population.
It has nationalism and sovereign independence as key motivators.
HasFeatureOf: It is characterized by its appeal to the largest mass of the population.
It is characterized by its anti-imperialist rhetoric.
It is characterized by an emphasis that revolution begins in rural regions among Nicaragua's oppressed peasantry.
It is characterized by ideas rooted in the symbols of Augusto César Sandino.
It is characterized by an effort to develop conscious growth through education.
Influenced: It influenced the Nicaraguan revolutionary front.
InfluencedBy: It was influenced by Augusto César Sandino.
It was influenced by the leaders of the Cuban Revolution in the 1950s.
It was influenced by Che Guevara's foco model.
It was influenced by the Cuban Revolution.
It was influenced by the life of Sandino.
It was influenced by Marxist classics.
It was influenced by scientific socialism.
It was influenced by revolutionary nationalism.
It was influenced by the Cuban Revolutionary experience led by Fidel Castro and Che Guevara.
IsA: It is a series of political and economic philosophies.
KnownAs: It is known as Sandinista ideology.
KnownFor: It is known for its emphasis on revolution beginning in rural regions.
It is known for its use of education to develop conscious growth.
It is known for its appeal to the largest mass of the population.
It is known for its anti-imperialist rhetoric.
NamedAfter: It is named after Augusto César Sandino.
OccurredDuring: It occurred during the late twentieth century.
PartOf: It is part of Nicaraguan history.
UsedFor: It is used for developing conscious growth through education.
It is used for inspiring socialist populism.
It is used for building a society resistant to economic and military intervention.
UsedTo: It is used to free the population from perceived historical fallacies.
It is used to awaken political thought among the people.
It is used to execute a guerrilla war against the Somoza regime.
It is used to attain freedom.
